body.title: [sprint] Consequence check: minion model registry current
body.intention: I intend that minion inference uses the benchmark-validated model list shipped in T-minion-model-upgrade.
body.description:
D-minion-model-upgrade-2026-06-01 shipped T-minion-model-upgrade (closed), but no consequence check was filed.

**What changed:** Inference model lineup upgraded to coding-benchmark-validated models — minion tier uses updated model names.

**Predicted unintended effects:** Model names may have been updated in the registry file but live inference may still use hardcoded or env-var overridden names. Benchmark-validated models may have since been updated or renamed upstream.

**Signals to watch:** Check the live model registry against what's actually dispatched in a minion inference call. Any CUDA/OOM errors that indicate model is too large for available hardware.

**Gate condition:** Check by 2026-06-23

**Affected files:** None — observation and registry review
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Verify live minion inference uses updated registry models, not stale names. Out of scope: benchmark re-running.
**Test plan:** no tests — registry inspection and live test call
**Completion criteria:** Read model registry, run one minion inference call, verify model used matches registry. Record: current / stale (list discrepancies).
